channel.title: TikTok Shop Dev Updates
channel.description: Official updates for TikTok Shop developer docs

item.title: All Market：Adjust product dimensions and weight to two decimal places
item.description: # Background To support a more consistent product publishing experience across all markets, TikTok Shop will standardize product **dimension** and **weight** values to **two decimal places**. This update is a data-format standardization. It does **not** introduce a new business rule, and it does **not** change the data type of the related Product API fields. According to the current Product API design, the affected dimension and weight fields are already defined as **string** values. This means ...
item.content:encoded: # Background To support a more consistent product publishing experience across all markets, TikTok Shop will standardize product **dimension** and **weight** values to **two decimal places**. This update is a data-format standardization. It does **not** introduce a new business rule, and it does **not** change the data type of the related Product API fields. According to the current Product API design, the affected dimension and weight fields are already defined as **string** values. This means ...

item.title: Gateway HTTP Access to Be Discontinued
item.description: **Breaking change.** From **[2026-06-17]**, the TikTok Shop Open Platform gateway `open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com` will accept **HTTPS only**. Requests sent over plain `http://` will be rejected and will not be processed. Make sure every integration calls the gateway over `https://` before this date to avoid service disruption. # Summary To strengthen the security of data in transit, access to the API gateway `open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com` will move to **HTTPS-only**. Plain-text HTTP access will...
item.content:encoded: **Breaking change.** From **[2026-06-17]**, the TikTok Shop Open Platform gateway `open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com` will accept **HTTPS only**. Requests sent over plain `http://` will be rejected and will not be processed. Make sure every integration calls the gateway over `https://` before this date to avoid service disruption. # Summary To strengthen the security of data in transit, access to the API gateway `open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com` will move to **HTTPS-only**. Plain-text HTTP access will...

item.title: For Philippine market: Updates to Mandatory Attributes on Chair Categories
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 4 August 2026, partners will be required to provide mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories: Chairs 876040, Outdoor Chairs 877704 and Chairs 879624. The mandatory product attributes will include : * Material / 100701 * If "Material = Plastic"", "PS/ICC No. / 101073” is mandatory. # Which markets are affected? The updates of the requirements apply to local to local and cross border sellers in the P...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 4 August 2026, partners will be required to provide mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories: Chairs 876040, Outdoor Chairs 877704 and Chairs 879624. The mandatory product attributes will include : * Material / 100701 * If "Material = Plastic"", "PS/ICC No. / 101073” is mandatory. # Which markets are affected? The updates of the requirements apply to local to local and cross border sellers in the P...

item.title: For Malaysia market: Updates to Mandatory Attributes on Beauty & Wellness Supplement Related Categories
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 9 July 2026, partners will be required to provide mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories: Beauty Supplement 700648, Fitness Supplements 700649, Vitamins, Minerals & Wellness Supplements 700650 and Herbal Supplements 2160400. The mandatory product attributes will include : * NPRA Registered * If "NPRA Registered = Yes", "MAL No. / 101088” is mandatory. # Which markets are affected? The updates of ...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 9 July 2026, partners will be required to provide mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API under the following categories: Beauty Supplement 700648, Fitness Supplements 700649, Vitamins, Minerals & Wellness Supplements 700650 and Herbal Supplements 2160400. The mandatory product attributes will include : * NPRA Registered * If "NPRA Registered = Yes", "MAL No. / 101088” is mandatory. # Which markets are affected? The updates of ...

item.title: Product APIs support regular Auction Product CRUD
item.description: # Summary ### What is changing Regular auction products are now supported across the Product API lifecycle. Developers can create and update regular auction products, and can identify auction status and starting bid information when reading product data. This release applies only to **regular auction products**. **Temporary Listing Auction Product** is out of scope for this release. ### Why this is changing This update extends auction product operations from Seller Center to the API channel, so ...
item.content:encoded: # Summary ### What is changing Regular auction products are now supported across the Product API lifecycle. Developers can create and update regular auction products, and can identify auction status and starting bid information when reading product data. This release applies only to **regular auction products**. **Temporary Listing Auction Product** is out of scope for this release. ### Why this is changing This update extends auction product operations from Seller Center to the API channel, so ...

item.title: Full Account Development Shop supports manual order status updates
item.description: **Summary** The Full Function Account Development Shop now supports manual order status updates for test orders placed in the TikTok App. This helps merchants and developers validate end-to-end forward and reverse order flows in the sandbox without relying on real fulfillment. [Development Shop Manual Order Status Update Guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/ar5ppjvv) # Highlights The Development Shop capability has been expanded so that test orders created from the TikTok App can now...
item.content:encoded: **Summary** The Full Function Account Development Shop now supports manual order status updates for test orders placed in the TikTok App. This helps merchants and developers validate end-to-end forward and reverse order flows in the sandbox without relying on real fulfillment. [Development Shop Manual Order Status Update Guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/ar5ppjvv) # Highlights The Development Shop capability has been expanded so that test orders created from the TikTok App can now...

item.title: Seller Access & Sandbox Rate Limit Updates
item.description: ## What's Changing ### 1. Inactive Seller Access Restriction TikTok Shop will restrict API access for seller or shop accounts that are in an **inactive status** (e.g., deactivated, closing, or otherwise unavailable). ### 2. Sandbox Account Rate Limit Update To optimize resource allocation, we are updating the rate limits for testing environments: * **Affected Users:** Developers making API calls using **test accounts or sandbox accounts**. * **Threshold:** Requests may be throttled with a **429 ...
item.content:encoded: ## What's Changing ### 1. Inactive Seller Access Restriction TikTok Shop will restrict API access for seller or shop accounts that are in an **inactive status** (e.g., deactivated, closing, or otherwise unavailable). ### 2. Sandbox Account Rate Limit Update To optimize resource allocation, we are updating the rate limits for testing environments: * **Affected Users:** Developers making API calls using **test accounts or sandbox accounts**. * **Threshold:** Requests may be throttled with a **429 ...

item.title: Analytics API Response Data Optimization
item.description: # Overview This release introduces three new versioned Analytics APIs that deliver enriched Seller Compass data, achieving full metric parity between the OpenAPI and the Seller Center Data Compass UI. Developers can now programmatically access comprehensive product performance metrics (including traffic funnel, conversion, and channel-level attribution), video performance metrics (with creator attribution and engagement data), and bestselling product image information — eliminating the need for ...
item.content:encoded: # Overview This release introduces three new versioned Analytics APIs that deliver enriched Seller Compass data, achieving full metric parity between the OpenAPI and the Seller Center Data Compass UI. Developers can now programmatically access comprehensive product performance metrics (including traffic funnel, conversion, and channel-level attribution), video performance metrics (with creator attribution and engagement data), and bestselling product image information — eliminating the need for ...

item.title: US/MX/SEA Market：Support product weight and dimensions at the SKU level
item.description: # What is changing? TikTok Shop is introducing **SKU-level dimension and weight support** in Partner APIs. This update allows product weight and dimensions to be maintained and synchronized at the SKU level, which improves shipping-related accuracy for products with multiple variants. Previously, weight and dimension data were mainly handled at the product level. With this release, APIs now support dedicated SKU-level fields so partners can send and retrieve more precise package information for ...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? TikTok Shop is introducing **SKU-level dimension and weight support** in Partner APIs. This update allows product weight and dimensions to be maintained and synchronized at the SKU level, which improves shipping-related accuracy for products with multiple variants. Previously, weight and dimension data were mainly handled at the product level. With this release, APIs now support dedicated SKU-level fields so partners can send and retrieve more precise package information for ...

item.title: Enhanced Get Tracking API for CBT First-Mile Pickup Visibility
item.description: **Effective date:** June 30, 2026 (target — final date confirmed at general availability) **API version:** `v202604` or later **Audience:** Apps that integrate with TikTok Shop logistics APIs for CBT orders ## Overview TikTok Shop is releasing an enhanced **Get Tracking API** that exposes the full end-to-end tracking history of CBT parcels — including the **first-mile pickup leg** that is currently missing from most App systems. Starting in late June 2026, your app can call a single endpoint to ...
item.content:encoded: **Effective date:** June 30, 2026 (target — final date confirmed at general availability) **API version:** `v202604` or later **Audience:** Apps that integrate with TikTok Shop logistics APIs for CBT orders ## Overview TikTok Shop is releasing an enhanced **Get Tracking API** that exposes the full end-to-end tracking history of CBT parcels — including the **first-mile pickup leg** that is currently missing from most App systems. Starting in late June 2026, your app can call a single endpoint to ...

item.title: EU Markets: Introducing VAT Calculation Service (VCS) — New Product and Order API Fields
item.description: # What is changing? TikTok Shop has introduced the VAT Calculation Service (VCS), a feature that automatically calculates the correct VAT on every sale made to customers in the European Union. When a seller enables VCS, two areas of the API are affected: 1. **Product listing — Product Tax Code (PTC)** A new product attribute has been added to support PTC. Use the [Get Attributes](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-attributes-202309) endpoint to retrieve the available `Product Tax Code...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? TikTok Shop has introduced the VAT Calculation Service (VCS), a feature that automatically calculates the correct VAT on every sale made to customers in the European Union. When a seller enables VCS, two areas of the API are affected: 1. **Product listing — Product Tax Code (PTC)** A new product attribute has been added to support PTC. Use the [Get Attributes](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-attributes-202309) endpoint to retrieve the available `Product Tax Code...

item.title: For US market: Mandatory Size Chart Quality Validation
item.description: # Updates to Product API For Size Chart Quality Validation **Effective Date:** * **Grace Period Start:** 2026-05-07 * **Full Enforcement Start:** 2026-07-07 ### What is changing? To improve the buyer experience and ensure size chart accuracy, TikTok Shop is introducing a new quality validation mechanism for size charts when editing existing products via the API. This change will be rolled out in two phases for existing products: 1. **Grace Period (Starts 2026-05-07):** The `edit_product` API **w...
item.content:encoded: # Updates to Product API For Size Chart Quality Validation **Effective Date:** * **Grace Period Start:** 2026-05-07 * **Full Enforcement Start:** 2026-07-07 ### What is changing? To improve the buyer experience and ensure size chart accuracy, TikTok Shop is introducing a new quality validation mechanism for size charts when editing existing products via the API. This change will be rolled out in two phases for existing products: 1. **Grace Period (Starts 2026-05-07):** The `edit_product` API **w...

item.title: Automated Order Combination — ISV Integration Guide
item.description: ## Overview > Introduction in Academy：https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=5369161871132458 TikTok Shop currently supports **Automated Order Combination** across all shopping channels in the US market. If the merchant has enabled this feature in the seller center，Eligible shopper orders placed with the same seller across Shop Tab, Video, and Livestream channels are auto-combined within a pre-defined time window when the buyer, buyer address, seller, and seller warehouse are...
item.content:encoded: ## Overview > Introduction in Academy：https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=5369161871132458 TikTok Shop currently supports **Automated Order Combination** across all shopping channels in the US market. If the merchant has enabled this feature in the seller center，Eligible shopper orders placed with the same seller across Shop Tab, Video, and Livestream channels are auto-combined within a pre-defined time window when the buyer, buyer address, seller, and seller warehouse are...

item.title: For Vietnam market: Updates to Mandatory attributes on Beauty & Personal Care, Health, Baby & Maternity, and Food & Beverages related categories
item.description: # What is changing? Starting from 26 May 2026, partners will be required to provide additional mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API for products under the following categories: Beauty & Personal Care, Health, Baby & Maternity, and Food & Beverages. The mandatory product attributes will include : * product license details * Product License Type * Product License Number * Date of Issuance * Place of Issuance They will be added into "product_attributes" paramet...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting from 26 May 2026, partners will be required to provide additional mandatory product attributes when listing or editing products by using API for products under the following categories: Beauty & Personal Care, Health, Baby & Maternity, and Food & Beverages. The mandatory product attributes will include : * product license details * Product License Type * Product License Number * Date of Issuance * Place of Issuance They will be added into "product_attributes" paramet...

item.title: New Feature: Inventory Update Webhook
item.description: # New Feature: Inventory Update Webhook ### What is changing? TikTok Shop is launching a new `inventory_update` webhook to push real-time events for SKU inventory quantity changes. Previously, developers had to indirectly infer inventory changes by subscribing to multiple webhook messages (e.g., order creation, marketing campaigns), which was complex and error-prone. The new `inventory_update` webhook standardizes inventory change notifications. Whether caused by new order creation, order cancel...
item.content:encoded: # New Feature: Inventory Update Webhook ### What is changing? TikTok Shop is launching a new `inventory_update` webhook to push real-time events for SKU inventory quantity changes. Previously, developers had to indirectly infer inventory changes by subscribing to multiple webhook messages (e.g., order creation, marketing campaigns), which was complex and error-prone. The new `inventory_update` webhook standardizes inventory change notifications. Whether caused by new order creation, order cancel...

item.title: For US Market: Add subscription order tag to Order APIs
item.description: ## Summary To help developers and sellers better manage inventory and fulfillment for subscription-based orders, we are introducing a new field, `is_subscription_order`, to our Order APIs. This allows for easy identification of orders generated from a customer's subscription. This change brings our Open API capabilities to parity with the functionality available in the TikTok Shop Seller Center, where subscription orders are already tagged. **What's a subscription order?** Subscription orders ar...
item.content:encoded: ## Summary To help developers and sellers better manage inventory and fulfillment for subscription-based orders, we are introducing a new field, `is_subscription_order`, to our Order APIs. This allows for easy identification of orders generated from a customer's subscription. This change brings our Open API capabilities to parity with the functionality available in the TikTok Shop Seller Center, where subscription orders are already tagged. **What's a subscription order?** Subscription orders ar...

item.title: US market: New GTM for OTC Mandatory Attributes
item.description: # Summary ### What are we launching To meet legal requirements for over-the-counter (OTC) medicines, new mandatory compliance attributes will be introduced for 31 OTC medicine categories. Sellers will be required to complete these new attributes for all new and existing product listings in the affected categories. ### When are we launching it The enforcement date is 4/17 and will be communicated in a follow-up notice. ### Impact All new and existing listings in the affected categories must inclu...
item.content:encoded: # Summary ### What are we launching To meet legal requirements for over-the-counter (OTC) medicines, new mandatory compliance attributes will be introduced for 31 OTC medicine categories. Sellers will be required to complete these new attributes for all new and existing product listings in the affected categories. ### When are we launching it The enforcement date is 4/17 and will be communicated in a follow-up notice. ### Impact All new and existing listings in the affected categories must inclu...

item.title: Bestsellers Analytics Open API Launch
item.description: ## Overview This release introduces the **Bestsellers Analytics OpenAPI**, a set of four new APIs that provide programmatic access to TikTok Shop's Bestsellers rankings from Data Compass. Developers can now retrieve the top 100 products, creators, videos, and LIVE sessions by GMV in the seller's authorized market. Previously, Bestsellers data was only available through the Seller Center web portal with no API access. Third-party data service providers — one of the most influential app categories...
item.content:encoded: ## Overview This release introduces the **Bestsellers Analytics OpenAPI**, a set of four new APIs that provide programmatic access to TikTok Shop's Bestsellers rankings from Data Compass. Developers can now retrieve the top 100 products, creators, videos, and LIVE sessions by GMV in the seller's authorized market. Previously, Bestsellers data was only available through the Seller Center web portal with no API access. Third-party data service providers — one of the most influential app categories...

item.title: New Capability for Affiliate Data Compass Offline Data Export
item.description: # Overview TikTok Shop is launching a new set of Affiliate Seller Compass Offline Data Export APIs under the `affiliate_seller` domain. These APIs enable developers (ISVs and in-house seller teams) to programmatically create, query, and download large-scale, asynchronous data reports from the Affiliate Seller Compass — including video performance, creator analytics, and other key business metrics. Previously, partners and sellers lacked an efficient, automated way to export large volumes of affi...
item.content:encoded: # Overview TikTok Shop is launching a new set of Affiliate Seller Compass Offline Data Export APIs under the `affiliate_seller` domain. These APIs enable developers (ISVs and in-house seller teams) to programmatically create, query, and download large-scale, asynchronous data reports from the Affiliate Seller Compass — including video performance, creator analytics, and other key business metrics. Previously, partners and sellers lacked an efficient, automated way to export large volumes of affi...

item.title: US market: Mandatory compliance attributes added for Paper Money and Coins Categories
item.description: # Summary ### What are we launching In the event that non-circulating currencies are sold as commodities, to ensure full regulatory compliance, we will introduce new mandatory attributes to the Get Attributes API. Sellers are required to fully complete all such attributes as a precondition for listing products in the affected product categories. ### When are we launching it API enforcement for product listings (**Create and Edit Product APIs**) with these compliance attributes will begin after *...
item.content:encoded: # Summary ### What are we launching In the event that non-circulating currencies are sold as commodities, to ensure full regulatory compliance, we will introduce new mandatory attributes to the Get Attributes API. Sellers are required to fully complete all such attributes as a precondition for listing products in the affected product categories. ### When are we launching it API enforcement for product listings (**Create and Edit Product APIs**) with these compliance attributes will begin after *...

item.title: US market: Updates to mandatory attributes
item.description: ## Summary To meet compliance requirements, TikTok Shop is making compliance-related attributes mandatory across various product categories. Starting from **2026-04-06**, the Products API will require these compliance-related attributes to be provided. ## Impact | Impacted market(s) | United States (US) | | --- | --- | | Impacted version(s) | 202309 (and later) | ## Changes The following attributes in the specified categories will become mandatory. | **Compliance scenario** | **Attributes affect...
item.content:encoded: ## Summary To meet compliance requirements, TikTok Shop is making compliance-related attributes mandatory across various product categories. Starting from **2026-04-06**, the Products API will require these compliance-related attributes to be provided. ## Impact | Impacted market(s) | United States (US) | | --- | --- | | Impacted version(s) | 202309 (and later) | ## Changes The following attributes in the specified categories will become mandatory. | **Compliance scenario** | **Attributes affect...

item.title: For all EU markets (EU5) Get Shipping Providers API
item.description: # What is changing? Starting **March 26, 2026**, the **Get Shipping Providers API** has been enhanced to support accurate **EU shipping provider resolution**. Due to interconnected logistics services within the EU, a single delivery option can correspond to **multiple cross-border shipping routes**. To return the correct shipping provider for a specific route, ISVs are now required to specify both: * the **shipping origin country** (warehouse), and * the **destination country** (buyer). Two new ...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting **March 26, 2026**, the **Get Shipping Providers API** has been enhanced to support accurate **EU shipping provider resolution**. Due to interconnected logistics services within the EU, a single delivery option can correspond to **multiple cross-border shipping routes**. To return the correct shipping provider for a specific route, ISVs are now required to specify both: * the **shipping origin country** (warehouse), and * the **destination country** (buyer). Two new ...

item.title: Analytics Open API Metric Consistency Adjustment Announcement
item.description: ### 1. Overview & Background To provide developers and merchants with a more consistent and accurate data experience, we will soon be adjusting the metric attribution for select Analytics Open APIs. This upgrade is designed to harmonize data definitions across different analytics products and help our partners more accurately measure business performance. ### 2. Summary of Changes To ensure a smooth transition, we will be introducing a **new API version** while making backward-compatible adjustm...
item.content:encoded: ### 1. Overview & Background To provide developers and merchants with a more consistent and accurate data experience, we will soon be adjusting the metric attribution for select Analytics Open APIs. This upgrade is designed to harmonize data definitions across different analytics products and help our partners more accurately measure business performance. ### 2. Summary of Changes To ensure a smooth transition, we will be introducing a **new API version** while making backward-compatible adjustm...

item.title: EU Markets: Category Rules Update – Responsible Person Attribute Now Mandatory
item.description: # What is changing? Starting **February 28, 2026**, the **Responsible Person (RP)** attribute will change from **optional to mandatory** in **selected existing product categories** where it was previously optional. Sellers must update existing listings to include the Responsible Person attribute by **March 28, 2026**. Listings that are not updated by this date may be **deactivated by the platform**. Updated API Endpoint(s): * [Get Category Rules ](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-ca...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? Starting **February 28, 2026**, the **Responsible Person (RP)** attribute will change from **optional to mandatory** in **selected existing product categories** where it was previously optional. Sellers must update existing listings to include the Responsible Person attribute by **March 28, 2026**. Listings that are not updated by this date may be **deactivated by the platform**. Updated API Endpoint(s): * [Get Category Rules ](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/get-ca...

item.title: For SEA Market: Recommended Improvement to Support Fast Delivery Service
item.description: # What is changing? When sellers choose **++Instant or Sameday shipping option++** to facilitate faster delivery to customers, TikTok Shop will aggressively evaluate the shipping and collection time of the orders to provide a satisfactory user experience. In Seller Center, there are several functions to support sellers for better managing these fast delivery orders. We recommend adopting the following changes 1. Allow sellers to print shipping labels before schedule shipping 2. Understand new SL...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? When sellers choose **++Instant or Sameday shipping option++** to facilitate faster delivery to customers, TikTok Shop will aggressively evaluate the shipping and collection time of the orders to provide a satisfactory user experience. In Seller Center, there are several functions to support sellers for better managing these fast delivery orders. We recommend adopting the following changes 1. Allow sellers to print shipping labels before schedule shipping 2. Understand new SL...

item.title: [Important] New Analytics API Supports Data Drill Down & Deprecation of Old Versions
item.description: # Summary The existing **Analytics APIs** have a **new** version for `202509`, with the primary objective of aligning the data caliber with Seller Center Data Compass. Additionally, 3 new APIs have been added to provide data granularity to help merchants and influencers review, consolidate, and iterate content (video + live) production processes. Details of the new API endpoints and functions are listed below. --- # Impact | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - local and cross-border | | --- | -...
item.content:encoded: # Summary The existing **Analytics APIs** have a **new** version for `202509`, with the primary objective of aligning the data caliber with Seller Center Data Compass. Additionally, 3 new APIs have been added to provide data granularity to help merchants and influencers review, consolidate, and iterate content (video + live) production processes. Details of the new API endpoints and functions are listed below. --- # Impact | Impacted market(s) | * All markets - local and cross-border | | --- | -...

item.title: 【Important Notice】Enable Support for the New “On Hold” Order Status
item.description: # **Mandatory Activation for All Apps in All Global Markets, Q1 2026** To enhance buyer experience and improve overall order processing stability, TikTok Shop introduced a new order status — **“On Hold”** — effective **December 13, 2023**. To ensure ecosystem-wide consistency, **TikTok Shop will automatically activate “On Hold” orders for all apps that have not yet enabled support starting in Q1 2026**. This means: **All apps that have not completed integration will begin receiving On Hold order...
item.content:encoded: # **Mandatory Activation for All Apps in All Global Markets, Q1 2026** To enhance buyer experience and improve overall order processing stability, TikTok Shop introduced a new order status — **“On Hold”** — effective **December 13, 2023**. To ensure ecosystem-wide consistency, **TikTok Shop will automatically activate “On Hold” orders for all apps that have not yet enabled support starting in Q1 2026**. This means: **All apps that have not completed integration will begin receiving On Hold order...

item.title: For Indonesian market: Changes in Order and Finance APIs for Horizon+ Orders
item.description: The orders with tag "Horizon+" will hide shipping fees at sku prices, so the sku prices will be increased and the shipping fee will be reduced. There are changes in order and finance APIs for this type of order which are estimated to be effective on January 22, 2026. By using these API, the sellers can get the original sku prices and shipping fees. These original sku prices and shipping fees can also be checked at the seller center. Here is the list of changes: 1. [Get Order Detail](https://part...
item.content:encoded: The orders with tag "Horizon+" will hide shipping fees at sku prices, so the sku prices will be increased and the shipping fee will be reduced. There are changes in order and finance APIs for this type of order which are estimated to be effective on January 22, 2026. By using these API, the sellers can get the original sku prices and shipping fees. These original sku prices and shipping fees can also be checked at the seller center. Here is the list of changes: 1. [Get Order Detail](https://part...

item.title: New Capability for Affiliate Sample Applications
item.description: # Overview This release introduces several new affiliate sample-related capabilities to improve the compliance and automation of the sample application workflow. Additionally, the platform now supports sub-account authorization for affiliate-category apps, allowing merchants to grant permissions to eligible sub-accounts for increased operational flexibility. ## What’s New * **New API:**[ Seller Get Sample Request Deeplink ](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/seller-get-sample-request-deep...
item.content:encoded: # Overview This release introduces several new affiliate sample-related capabilities to improve the compliance and automation of the sample application workflow. Additionally, the platform now supports sub-account authorization for affiliate-category apps, allowing merchants to grant permissions to eligible sub-accounts for increased operational flexibility. ## What’s New * **New API:**[ Seller Get Sample Request Deeplink ](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/seller-get-sample-request-deep...

item.title: For SEA market: The parameter "handover_method" in API Ship Package and Batch Ship Package will be useless for cross-border overseas sellers
item.description: # What is changing? From June 17, 2024, Platform updated the collection method to support sellers to choose different collection methods for different warehouse content. The parameter "handover_method" in API [Ship Package](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1?external_id=650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1#Back%20To%20Top) and [Batch Ship Package](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa3ebbace3e02b75d8bd4?external_id=650aa3ebbace3e02b75d8bd4#Back%20To%20Top) will be u...
item.content:encoded: # What is changing? From June 17, 2024, Platform updated the collection method to support sellers to choose different collection methods for different warehouse content. The parameter "handover_method" in API [Ship Package](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1?external_id=650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1#Back%20To%20Top) and [Batch Ship Package](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa3ebbace3e02b75d8bd4?external_id=650aa3ebbace3e02b75d8bd4#Back%20To%20Top) will be u...
